title: Publications | Ministry of Health NZ
content:
## Publications Ngā whakaputanga kōrero
- Questionnaires and Content Guide 2024/25: New Zealand Health Survey Publication date: 19 November 2025 The content guide describes the content of the New Zealand Health Survey for the year ended 30 June 2025. Data was collected between July 2024 and July 2025. Publication Surveys

## Questionnaires and Content Guide 2024/25: New Zealand Health Survey
The content guide describes the content of the New Zealand Health Survey for the year ended 30 June 2025. Data was collected between July 2024 and July 2025.
- Methodology Report 2024/25: New Zealand Health Survey Publication date: 19 November 2025 This methodology report details the procedures and protocols followed to ensure the New Zealand Health Survey produces the high-quality and robust data expected of official statistics. Publication Surveys

## Methodology Report 2024/25: New Zealand Health Survey
This methodology report details the procedures and protocols followed to ensure the New Zealand Health Survey produces the high-quality and robust data expected of official statistics.
- Compliance Guide for Dental Radiology including Dental Cone Beam CT: ORS G4 Publication date: 19 November 2025 Guidance document for activities related to intra-oral, panoramic and cephalometric dental procedures (traditional dental X-ray units) and cone beam computed tomography dental procedures (CBCT dental X-ray units). Publication Radiation safety

## Compliance Guide for Dental Radiology including Dental Cone Beam CT: ORS G4
Guidance document for activities related to intra-oral, panoramic and cephalometric dental procedures (traditional dental X-ray units) and cone beam computed tomography dental procedures (CBCT dental X-ray units).
- Annual Update of Key Results 2024/25: New Zealand Health Survey Publication date: 19 November 2025 The Annual Data Explorer presents results from the 2024/25 New Zealand Health Survey, with comparisons to earlier surveys where possible. Publication Alcohol Asian health Child health Diabetes Disability Drugs Māori health Mental health Nutrition Pacific health Obesity Older people (65+) Oral health Socioeconomic deprivation Statistics Surveys Tobacco

## Annual Update of Key Results 2024/25: New Zealand Health Survey
The Annual Data Explorer presents results from the 2024/25 New Zealand Health Survey, with comparisons to earlier surveys where possible.
- Socioeconomic deprivation
- Whakamaua Quantitative Dashboard: Year Five Publication date: 4 November 2025 This publication is an interactive web tool showing a statistical overview of the 13 quantitative measures for Whakamaua : the Māori Health Action Plan 2020–2025. Publication Māori health Statistics

## Whakamaua Quantitative Dashboard: Year Five
This publication is an interactive web tool showing a statistical overview of the 13 quantitative measures for Whakamaua : the Māori Health Action Plan 2020–2025.
- Ministry of Health Annual Report for the year ended 30 June 2025 Publication date: 20 October 2025 The Ministry of Health – Manatū Hauora Annual Report for the year ended 30 June 2025 summarises the Ministry’s progress towards our Strategic Intentions, and reports on our financial and non-financial performance for 2024/25, as required under the Public Finance Act 1989. Publication About the Ministry

## Ministry of Health Annual Report for the year ended 30 June 2025
The Ministry of Health – Manatū Hauora Annual Report for the year ended 30 June 2025 summarises the Ministry’s progress towards our Strategic Intentions, and reports on our financial and non-financial performance for 2024/25, as required under the Public Finance Act 1989.
- Consultation on the Code of Practice for the Security of Radioactive Material: ORS C5 2021 Publication date: 20 October 2025 Last updated: 2 February 2026 The Director for Radiation Safety (the Director) has reviewed the Code of Practice for the Security of Radioactive Material: ORS C5 2021 (ORS C5 2021). Consultation Radiation safety

## Consultation on the Code of Practice for the Security of Radioactive Material: ORS C5 2021
The Director for Radiation Safety (the Director) has reviewed the Code of Practice for the Security of Radioactive Material: ORS C5 2021 (ORS C5 2021).
- New Zealand Practice Guidelines for Opioid Substitution Treatment 2025 Publication date: 16 October 2025 Last updated: 20 November 2025 The New Zealand Practice Guidelines for Opioid Substitution Treatment provide clinical and procedural guidance for specialist services and primary health care providers who deliver opioid substitution treatment. Publication Drugs Mental health

## New Zealand Practice Guidelines for Opioid Substitution Treatment 2025
The New Zealand Practice Guidelines for Opioid Substitution Treatment provide clinical and procedural guidance for specialist services and primary health care providers who deliver opioid substitution treatment.
- Home and Community Support Services Conformity Assessment Bodies: Auditing Requirements Publication date: 6 October 2025 This publication outlines the requirements for conformity assessment bodies (CABs) that are auditing and certifying providers of home and community support services (HCSS) against Ngā paerewa Health and disability services standard (NZS 8134;2021) Publication Older people (65+) Certification of health care services

## Home and Community Support Services Conformity Assessment Bodies: Auditing Requirements
This publication outlines the requirements for conformity assessment bodies (CABs) that are auditing and certifying providers of home and community support services (HCSS) against Ngā paerewa Health and disability services standard (NZS 8134;2021)
- Certification of health care services
- Guidelines for the Role and Function of District Inspectors Publication date: 3 October 2025 Formal guidelines issued under the Mental Health Act, Intellectual Disability Act, and Substance Addiction Act that have been prepared to help District Inspectors in the exercise of their powers, duties, and functions. Publication Mental health

## Guidelines for the Role and Function of District Inspectors
Formal guidelines issued under the Mental Health Act, Intellectual Disability Act, and Substance Addiction Act that have been prepared to help District Inspectors in the exercise of their powers, duties, and functions.
- Consultation on Amendments to the Specified Prescription Medicines List for Designated Registered Nurse Prescribers in Primary Health and Specialty Teams Publication date: 18 September 2025 This document supports the consultation on proposed changes to the specified prescription medicines list for designated registered nurse prescribers working in primary health or specialty teams. Consultation Medicine issues

## Consultation on Amendments to the Specified Prescription Medicines List for Designated Registered Nurse Prescribers in Primary Health and Specialty Teams
This document supports the consultation on proposed changes to the specified prescription medicines list for designated registered nurse prescribers working in primary health or specialty teams.
- Consultation on Amendments to the Specified Prescription Medicines List for Designated Pharmacist Prescribers Publication date: 18 September 2025 Consultation on amendments to the specified prescription medicines list for designated pharmacist prescribers Consultation Medicine issues

## Consultation on Amendments to the Specified Prescription Medicines List for Designated Pharmacist Prescribers
Consultation on amendments to the specified prescription medicines list for designated pharmacist prescribers
- Health and Independence Report 2024 Publication date: 18 September 2025 This publication presents an overview of the current state of public health in Aotearoa New Zealand, using health-related data from a range of sources for the 2024 calendar year. Publication Statistics

## Health and Independence Report 2024
This publication presents an overview of the current state of public health in Aotearoa New Zealand, using health-related data from a range of sources for the 2024 calendar year.
- Putting Patients First: Modernising health workforce regulation: Summary of submissions Publication date: 12 September 2025 The Summary of submissions provides an overview of submissions received on the document Putting Patients First: Modernising health workforce regulation. Consultation on this was open from March to April 2025. Publication Health Practitioners Competence Assurance Act Workforce

## Putting Patients First: Modernising health workforce regulation: Summary of submissions
The Summary of submissions provides an overview of submissions received on the document Putting Patients First: Modernising health workforce regulation. Consultation on this was open from March to April 2025.
- Health Practitioners Competence Assurance Act
- Fetal Alcohol Spectrum Disorder (FASD) Community Engagement Insights Report Publication date: 9 September 2025 The Fetal Alcohol Spectrum Disorder (FASD) Community Engagement Insights Report outlines priorities and recommendations from the FASD community to inform the development of the FASD Strategic Action Plan 2025-2028. Publication Fetal alcohol spectrum disorder Alcohol Public health

## Fetal Alcohol Spectrum Disorder (FASD) Community Engagement Insights Report
The Fetal Alcohol Spectrum Disorder (FASD) Community Engagement Insights Report outlines priorities and recommendations from the FASD community to inform the development of the FASD Strategic Action Plan 2025-2028.
